title: Delhi High Court rejects plea against removing defamatory content on Hardeep Puri’s daughter
description: A bench of justices Vivek Chaudhary and Renu Bhatnagar, however, asked the petitioner, Kunal Shukla, a Raipur-based activist, to file an application for vacating the single judge’s March 17 order, and asked the single judge to promptly consider the same on April 23.
